title: Lumpcode local configuration
description: Schema for .lumpcode/local.json — a gitignored, per-machine file that controls where and how Lumpcode runs lumps from this checkout. Created by `lumpcode project-setup`; edit it on a daemon machine (e.g. switch `mode` to "dedicated").

mode.description: How Lumpcode handles the current checkout. `shared`: this is your day-to-day clone; Lumpcode never touches it and runs in a separate copy under ~/.lumpcode/project-copies/<projectName>/. `dedicated`: this clone is owned by Lumpcode (typical daemon machine); Lumpcode pulls and runs in place, including a destructive `git reset --hard` on the active integration branch before each tick.

projectBaseBranch.description: Single integration branch. Required when `projectBaseBranches` is omitted. When both are set, `projectBaseBranches` wins for the effective allowlist. Also used as the primary branch default when set (lump `baseBranch` fallback and default pre-flight target).

projectBaseBranches.description: Optional non-empty integration-branch allowlist. When present, wins over singular `projectBaseBranch` for the effective list (array order is daemon tick order in dedicated mode). `projectBaseBranch` may be omitted when this array is non-empty.

workspaceStrategy.description: How each lump run prepares git inside the preflight workspace. `checkout` (default): switch the main worktree to a fresh lump branch. `worktree`: run in a linked worktree under `.lumpcode/worktrees/<branch>/` so the main worktree stays on the lump integration branch.

disabled.description: When true, the background daemon (`lumpcode start`) skips every lump on this machine without stopping the scheduler. Manual `lumpcode run` is unaffected.
